settings-section.heading: Support Phylax
settings-section.description: Phylax is developed as an open-source project with no tracking, no cloud, and no ads. If the app helps you and you want to support the project, you can find all support options via the link below.

onboarding-card.heading: Welcome to Phylax
onboarding-card.description-1: Phylax is an open-source project by a single developer. No cloud, no tracking, no ads.
onboarding-card.description-2: If Phylax helps you and you want to support the project:
onboarding-card.settings-hint: You can find this notice in Settings at any time.

reminder-banner.text_one: You have been using Phylax for one month. If you like the project, you can support its development.
reminder-banner.text_other: You have been using Phylax for {{count}} months. If you like the project, you can support its development.
